TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_B‚Äôbukeykay, title = B‚Äôbukeykay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/B‚Äôbukeykay} }

S.FORM: B'bukeykay Itiniay i Nan'ao Cen no Yilan ko B'bukeykay a niyaro', 93 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 314 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 286 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 28 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 82%, Amis 2%, Truku 1%, Bunun 2%, roma 4%.
S.PHON: b~b~v °b~b~vo~u~uk…ôjkaj itiniaj i nan °ao~u ¶…ôn no~u ji…ĺan ko~u b~b~v °b~b~vo~u~uk…ôjkaj a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, amis *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: B'bukeykay Itiniay i Nan'ao Cen no Yilan ko B'bukeykay a niyaro', 93 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 314 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 286 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 28 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 82%, Amis 2%, Truku 1%, Bunun 2%, roma 4%.
